title: Feuilleea ramiflora

taxonomy: Feuilleea ramiflora is classified within the plant kingdom, specifically within the division Magnoliophyta, which includes flowering plants. It belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledonous flowering plants, characterized by having two cotyledons in their seeds. The order is Celastrales, a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Feuilleea ramiflora's family is Celastraceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff tree family. At the genus and species level, it is classified as Feuilleea ramiflora, although further classification may vary depending on the source.
